page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The CPU architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AVX-512 Foundation, and AVX-512 Vector Neural Network Instructions (VNNI), which assist in accelerating vector calculations and cryptographic operations.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.hfr6.8xlarge demonstrates solid mid-range performance. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a stress-ng single-core CPU score of 1436.69 and a multi-core score of 30656.07. Memory performance is highlighted by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1704.61 GB/sec, while large block uncached read and write bandwidths reach 112.52 GB/sec and 49.63 GB/sec respectively. The instance also shows strong capability in database operations, scoring 11530.5 on Passmark database tests and executing 28.86 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks. For lightweight machine learning workloads, the system processes 1572.28 tokens per second for prompt processing on a small 135M LLM model, and 46.27 tokens per second on a medium 7B model. Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers a cost-efficient profile for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 3.1 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it delivers 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core resource density. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate balanced performance, with a Passmark CPU score of 29575.82 and a Redis SET throughput of 28.86 million operations per second. The processor supports AVX-512 instructions, aiding vector and cryptography workloads. This hardware profile is highly efficient for memory-intensive applications that rely on network-attached storage, such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and data processing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 256 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and 10 Gbps networking for demanding in-memory database workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 32 physical cores at 3.1 GHz.
256.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core memory density.
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage.
High-throughput memory performance with 28.86 million Redis SET operations per second.
Best suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise data processing.
